canonical_question: How do I build a marketplace financial model — GMV model, take rate sensitivity, unit economics per side, liquidity?
aliases: How to model GMV and take rate for a two-sided marketplace
Supply-side and demand-side unit economics for marketplace startups
Marketplace liquidity and chicken-and-egg financial projections

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: Marketplace valuation multiples shifted in 2025 — revenue multiples compressed to 2.0-4.0x from 5-10x in 2021-2022

constraints: Take rate must be modeled as a sensitivity range (5-25%), not a fixed number
GMV projections must separate organic growth from paid acquisition
Supply-side and demand-side unit economics must be modeled independently
Liquidity metrics must be modeled as constraints on growth
Financial model must include a death zone calculation

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs a general SaaS financial model, not a marketplace model
User needs marketplace strategy and positioning, not financial modeling
User is modeling a marketplace with 50K+ monthly transactions

depends_on.label: Marketplace concept definition and value proposition

related_to.label: SaaS unit economics benchmarks for comparison

inputs_needed.question: What type of marketplace is being modeled?
What is the user's technical skill level?
